suggestedEdits.fact: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04584281 with status UNKNOWN, phase N/A, enrollment 15000, lead sponsor Insel Gruppe AG, University Hospital Bern, countries Switzerland.
suggestedEdits.report: The project leaders plan to create a clinical decision support (CDS) system by programming a self-learning software to analyze the cardiotocography (CTG) traces in the - already existing - database from the maternity department of the Inselspital Berne. The project is in early stages.

suggestedEdits.fact: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT00672594 with status COMPLETED, phase PHASE2, enrollment 30, lead sponsor Duke University, countries United States.
suggestedEdits.report: The purpose of this study is to look at blood and tissue samples for changes following the use of Sunitinib malate. Additionally, we would like to find out if the drug, Sunitinib malate, is safe and works in men with prostate cancer.
